summary.label: Summary
summary.help: Summary: floor stakes, pressure leaders, and why this turn matters.

board.label: Board
board.help: Board: live pressure markers, rival status, and civil-war risk.

chronicle.label: Chronicle
chronicle.help: Chronicle: concise timeline of dynasty shifts across floors.

debug.label: Debug
debug.help: Debug: raw state for troubleshooting only; ignore during normal play.

points.current_decision: Act in Current Decision; that is the only required move right now.
points.decision_details: Use Decision Details to confirm what this phase is asking and what your options do.
points.summary_board: Summary explains this floor; Board shows who is gaining pressure.
points.chronicle: Chronicle is your short history of what changed across floors and hosts.
points.choice_cards: On choice cards, read the first line first for immediate effect.

glossary.doctrine: Doctrine reflects your current strategic identity and bias for resolving pressure.
glossary.heir_pressure: Heir Pressure marks branches currently poised to seize succession if momentum continues.
glossary.civil_war_danger: Civil War Danger means current pressure patterns can trigger a costly conflict state. High danger is a signal to reduce instability before it snowballs.
glossary.central_rival: Central Rival is the branch currently best positioned to oppose your line over upcoming floors.
glossary.controlled_vote: Controlled Vote means this floor referendum is being shaped or forced by your active effects and commitments, not a free pick.
glossary.clue_fit: Clue Fit / Memory indicates how strongly this option aligns with recent featured-round reads and floor clue history.
glossary.lineage_direction: Lineage Direction summarizes where your dynasty composition is drifting: hosts, kin support, and outsider pressure.

decision_helpers.powerup_choice: Pick by the first-line effect; use tags and notes only as tie-breakers.
decision_helpers.successor_choice: Compare Cause, Pick for, Risk, Pitch, and Clue fit before choosing host.

hints.summary_tab_context: Open Summary tab for full floor context.
hints.summary_tab_choose: Use Summary tab for floor-level context while choosing.

messages.pick_one_offer: Pick one offer in Current Decision.
messages.pick_one_genome: Pick one genome edit in Current Decision.
